events.name: Eintracht Frankfurt at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Harry Kane marked his first appearance in Der Klassiker with a hat-trick as Bayern Munich thrashed Borussia Dortmund 4-0 away on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane hat-trick sees Bayern thrash Dortmund

video.headline: Harry Kane scores a hat trick in his first Der Klassiker
